summary: Aligned frontend/base contract structure consumption toward semantic_page for tree/form/kanban and completed required verification commands.
risks: ActionView still uses custom page assembly and is not yet a full semantic_page.zones block renderer.
Full native-isomorphic structure parity requires a follow-up batch to switch main rendering pipeline to zone-driven composition.
next_step: Create next implementation task to migrate ActionView list/form/kanban rendering pipeline to semantic_page.zones-first composition.
